hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\.env(\.keys|\.local|\.production(\.local)?|\.development(\.local)?|\.staging(\.local)?)?([[:space:]]|$)'; then jq -n '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Reading .env secret files via shell is blocked."}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git +commit'; then lint_out=$(cd /Users/Svitlana_Korostelova/kompanionki/apps/mobile && npx eslint src 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg msg "ESLint check failed. Fix errors before committing:\n$lint_out" '{"continue": false, "stopReason": $msg}'; fi; fi
